title: Ultimate Gaming Arena — Sound Effects, Difficulty Levels & Selector Screens

requirements.summary: Create a global sound manager module that plays distinct sound effects for click/button press, win, game over, score increment, and special events using HTML5 Audio API with a persistent mute/unmute toggle
acceptanceCriteria: Distinct sounds play for click, win, game over, score, and special events across all games.
A mute/unmute toggle button is visible and functional in all game pages.
Mute state persists across page refreshes via localStorage.
No sound plays when muted.

file_operations.description: Create a global sound manager hook using HTML5 Audio API to manage five distinct sound effects (click, win, game over, score, special event). Implement mute/unmute state persisted in localStorage and expose play functions for each sound type plus a toggle function.

requirements.summary: Create a reusable DifficultySelector component styled in the dark neon theme that presents Easy/Medium/Hard options and appears before Tic Tac Toe (SinglePlayer), Snake, and Traffic Car games start
acceptanceCriteria: A full-screen or overlay difficulty selector appears when navigating to Tic Tac Toe (SinglePlayer), Snake, and Traffic Car pages before gameplay begins.
Selector shows Easy, Medium, and Hard options with neon styling consistent with the rest of the app.
Selecting a difficulty dismisses the selector and starts the game at the chosen difficulty.
Returning to the selector (e.g., restart) re-shows the difficulty screen.

file_operations.description: Create a reusable DifficultySelector component that renders a full-screen overlay with game title and three neon-styled buttons (Easy, Medium, Hard). Accept onSelect callback prop that receives the chosen difficulty string. Use neon-btn and neon-text classes from index.css for consistent dark neon theme styling.

requirements.summary: Upgrade SinglePlayer Tic Tac Toe with three AI difficulty modes (Easy: random moves, Medium: mixed random/optimal, Hard: Minimax algorithm) controlled by the DifficultySelector screen
acceptanceCriteria: Easy AI makes fully random valid moves.
Medium AI alternates or randomly mixes random and Minimax moves.
Hard AI uses Minimax and never loses.
Difficulty label is shown during gameplay (e.g., badge or subtitle).
Win/lose/draw sound effects play on respective outcomes.

file_operations.description: Integrate DifficultySelector component to show before game starts. Add state to track selected difficulty. Implement three AI strategies: Easy (random moves), Medium (50/50 mix of random and Minimax), and Hard (pure Minimax). Display difficulty badge during gameplay. Integrate useSoundManager hook to play win/lose/draw sound effects on game outcomes and click sounds on moves.
Create a utility module implementing the Minimax algorithm for unbeatable Tic Tac Toe AI. Export a function that takes the current board state and returns the optimal move coordinates.

requirements.summary: Upgrade Snake game with three speed-based difficulty modes (Easy: ~200ms tick, Medium: ~130ms tick, Hard: ~70ms tick) controlled by the DifficultySelector screen
acceptanceCriteria: Easy mode runs at a visibly slow snake speed.
Medium mode runs at the current default speed.
Hard mode runs noticeably faster than Medium.
Difficulty label is displayed during gameplay.
Sound effects play on food eaten (score), game over, and new high score.

file_operations.description: Integrate DifficultySelector component to show before game starts. Add state to track selected difficulty and map it to tick intervals (Easy: 200ms, Medium: 130ms, Hard: 70ms). Update game loop to use difficulty-based interval. Display difficulty badge during gameplay. Integrate useSoundManager hook to play score sound on food eaten, game over sound on collision, and special event sound on new high score.

requirements.summary: Upgrade Traffic Car game with three difficulty modes (Easy: slow/sparse traffic, Medium: normal, Hard: fast/dense traffic) controlled by the DifficultySelector screen
acceptanceCriteria: Easy mode has visibly slower and sparser traffic.
Medium mode matches current default behavior.
Hard mode has faster and denser traffic from the start.
Difficulty label is displayed during gameplay.
Sound effects play on collision (game over), scoring milestones, and special events.

file_operations.description: Integrate DifficultySelector component to show before game starts. Add state to track selected difficulty and map it to traffic parameters (Easy: slow speed + fewer cars, Medium: current defaults, Hard: fast speed + more simultaneous cars). Adjust car spawn rate and speed based on difficulty. Display difficulty badge during gameplay. Integrate useSoundManager hook to play game over sound on collision, score sound on milestones, and special event sound for achievements (keep existing Web Audio engine sound).

requirements.summary: Integrate the global mute/unmute toggle button into all game pages and the Home page, styled consistently with the dark neon theme
acceptanceCriteria: Mute/unmute button is visible on all game pages.
Button shows a clear muted vs. unmuted visual state.
Button uses neon styling consistent with the app theme.
Toggling mute immediately silences or restores all game sounds.

file_operations.description: Create a reusable SoundToggle component that uses useSoundManager hook to display the current mute state and toggle it on click. Render a speaker icon with neon glow styling that changes visual state when muted (e.g., speaker-off icon or slashed speaker). Use neon-btn class for consistent theme styling.
Add SoundToggle component to the header/navbar area of the Home page, positioned consistently with the neon theme layout (e.g., top-right corner).
Add SoundToggle component to the game page header area for in-game mute control.
Add SoundToggle component to the game page header area for in-game mute control.
Add SoundToggle component to the game page header area for in-game mute control.
Add SoundToggle component to the game page header area for in-game mute control.
Add SoundToggle component to the game page header area for in-game mute control.
Add SoundToggle component to the game page header area for in-game mute control.
Add SoundToggle component to the game page header area for in-game mute control.
